name: Winard Harper
abstract: Hiram Winard Harper (born June 4, 1962) is an American jazz drummer.

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Barron
about_quotes.evidence: Winard Harper, various – Anthony Cox. So, a lot of different variations with the – it was always great working with them.

about_quotes.speaker: Ray Bryant
about_quotes.evidence: If I need a trio, I guess one of the first drummers I would call would be Winard Harper. He’s on this recording also.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ray Bryant interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, March 22, 1998

about_quotes.speaker: Delfeayo Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: On the live show it’ll be Winard Harper and Jason [Marsalis] alternating
